name: Welcome to x402 - Coinbase Developer Documentation
snippet:
x402 is a new open payment protocol developed by Coinbase that enables instant, automatic stablecoin payments directly over HTTP . Read more
Buyers: Human developers and AI agents seeking to access paid services without accounts or manual payment flows. Both sellers and buyers interact directly through HTTP requests, with payment handled transparently through the protocol.

name: x402: The Payment Protocol for Agentic Commerce
snippet: The x402 protocol utilizes the long-reserved HTTP 402 ”Payment Required” status code to require a payment to complete an API request or load a webpage. If an API request lacks payment, x402 responds with an HTTP 402 Payment Required status, prompting the client to pay and retry.
